content.json:
# Windows Firewall — Policy / Rule-Change Monitoring
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1562.004 Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall
**Theme:** Windows Firewall deny parsing · **Data source:** `SecurityEvent` (EventID 4946/4947/4948 rule add/modify/delete, 4950/4954 setting/profile change, 5031 app blocked from accepting connections).

Who changed firewall rules, apps blocked from listening, change timeline, and firewall-disabled/profile-change events.

> Requires the MPSSVC Rule-Level Policy Change audit subcategory enabled.

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID in (4946, 4947, 4948) | extend Change=case(EventID == 4946, 'Rule added', EventID == 4947, 'Rule modified', 'Rule deleted'), RuleName=tostring(EventData.RuleName) | summarize Count=count() by Computer, SubjectUserName, Change, RuleName | top 200 by Count desc
content.title: Firewall rule add / modify / delete by user

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5031 | extend App=tostring(EventData.Application) | summarize Count=count() by Computer, App | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Apps blocked from accepting connections (5031)

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID in (4946, 4947, 4948, 4950, 4954) | summarize Changes=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 6h), Computer | render timechart
content.title: Policy-change timeline

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4950 | extend Setting=tostring(EventData.SettingType), NewValue=tostring(EventData.SettingValue), Profile=tostring(EventData.ProfileChanged) | project TimeGenerated, Computer, SubjectUserName, Profile, Setting, NewValue | sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Firewall setting / profile changes (4950)
